title: polygala subalata
intro: Polygala subalata, also known as Chinese honeywort, is a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polygala subalata is often used in teas, infusions, or combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
